label: Transparent Zebra motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Zebra transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated zebra motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single adult plains zebra in a refined naturalistic editorial cutout, full body side/front three-quarter view, crisp black and white stripe pattern, clean mane, alert ears, accurate anatomy, subtle warm grass-gold reflected highlights only on the white coat edges, high-contrast silhouette, detailed fur texture but not shaggy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include all legs, hooves, tail, mane, ears, and muzzle without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves black stripes, warm white coat, charcoal shadows, and fine coat texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape, no grass, no tree, no second animal, no saddle, no harness, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt: Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Zebra" / "Zebra Stripe", derived from the isolated zebra motif. Target 3840x2160 composition; make all labels large and readable at gallery preview size. System mood: high contrast dashboard system for grassland analytics and operational SaaS. Visual language: crisp zebra-stripe rhythm, black ink structure, warm ivory surfaces, grass-gold accents, dry grass neutrals, restrained utilitarian dashboard density, sharp readable hierarchy. Include palette, typography with English and Japanese guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, validation states, texture, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, and sample usage. Use Ivory Dust #F7F0E5, Stripe Black #11100E, Warm White #FFFDF8, Grass Gold #C49A32, Dry Grass #B9A36B, Clay Taupe #8B7A5D, Hoof Charcoal #2B2924, Soft Sand #E6D7BD, and Signal Rust #B65A2A. Exclude generic purple gradients, neon colors, busy safari illustration, full landscape hero, low-contrast beige-only palette, decorative card collage, unreadable microtext, random logos, and watermarks.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt: Create one high-resolution wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Zebra" / "Zebra Stripe", derived from the zebra motif and matching the light-mode board. Target 3840x2160 composition; make all labels large and readable at gallery preview size. System mood: high contrast dark dashboard system for grassland analytics and operational SaaS. Visual language: charcoal-black surfaces, ivory text, crisp zebra-stripe rhythm, warm grass-gold active states, dry grass neutrals, utilitarian dashboard density, premium data-console feel. Include palette, typography with English and Japanese guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, validation states, texture, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, and sample usage. Use Night Stripe #11100E, Ivory Text #F7F0E5, Deep Charcoal #1E1C18, Card Umber #2B2924, Grass Gold #C49A32, Dry Grass #B9A36B, Clay Taupe #8B7A5D, Muted Sand #D8C9AC, and Signal Rust #B65A2A. Exclude generic purple gradients, neon colors, busy safari illustration, full landscape hero, low-contrast beige-only palette, decorative card collage, unreadable microtext, random logos, and watermarks.
